==================================================

- China regulator (SAMR, CSRC, PBOC, SAT, MOFCOM) made a NEW announcement or policy change
- Law or policy NEWLY changed in Singapore / Hong Kong / China
- Major NEW compliance requirement affecting businesses in these 3 markets
- Work pass / employment / immigration rule NEWLY changed in any of these 3 markets
- AML/KYC/governance rule NEW update for these 3 markets
- Budget measure or tax change NEWLY announced in these 3 markets
- Company incorporation, secretarial, entity management NEW regulatory update
- M&A, acquisition, liquidation NEW regulatory update in these 3 markets
- Fund governance, fund compliance NEW rule change
- Family office, trust, private client NEW regulation update
- Foreign investment or FDI NEW policy change in these 3 markets

Give a MEDIUM score (50-69) if:
- Article explicitly mentions a regulator AND describes concrete impact on Ascentium service areas in Singapore/HK/China
- ASEAN/regional regulatory development with clear and named Singapore/HK/China impact
- Hiring, workforce, payroll, immigration, PEO/EOR trends with regulatory angle in these 3 markets
- Fund industry, family office, M&A activity with compliance angle in these 3 markets
- Global tax change (OECD, FATF) that explicitly and directly affects Singapore/HK/China businesses
- Economy, trade, FDI data for these 3 markets with direct named business implications
- Named competitor (Tricor, Vistra, Intertrust, Aztec, Hawksford, TMF Group, Boardroom, Citco, IQ-EQ, Apex Group) expanding in Singapore/HK/China
- Government incentives, grants, tax refund schemes newly announced in these 3 markets

Give score 0 if:
- Matches any auto-reject rule in STEP 1
- No connection to any Ascentium service area
- Pure foreign jurisdiction with zero Singapore/HK/China relevance
- Generic business environment article with no specific regulatory or service angle
- Static government website page, directory, portal, or tool listing
- Regulatory change is older than 30 days

==================================================
STEP 3: CATEGORY & SUB-CATEGORY SELECTION
==================================================

You MUST choose:
- category: ONLY from the 10 exact categories listed above
- sub_category: ONLY from the sub-categories listed under that category

COMPETITOR INTELLIGENCE — ONLY use if article explicitly names one of these companies:
Tricor, Vistra, Intertrust, Aztec Group, Hawksford, TMF Group, Boardroom, Citco, IQ-EQ, Apex Group
AND they are expanding services, opening offices, or acquiring businesses in Singapore/HK/China.
DO NOT use for real estate developers, banks, insurance, tech companies, or any company not in this list.

==================================================

==================================================

Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation:

{"category":"<exact category>","sub_category":"<exact sub-category>","ai_summary":"<2 sentences: what happened and why it matters to Ascentium clients in Singapore/HK/China>","relevance_score":<0-100>,"relevance_reason":"<one sentence explaining WHAT specifically makes this relevant to Ascentium — mention the exact regulation/law/policy name AND which market (Singapore, Hong Kong, or China) it affects>" }
